name: trpg-runtime-v2
description: Local OpenClaw plugin providing structured TRPG runtime tools

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('trpg-runtime-v2: no build step required (TS loaded via jiti).')"
scripts.smoke:manifest: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('openclaw.plugin.json','utf8'));if(!m.id||!m.configSchema){throw new Error('manifest invalid')}console.log('manifest ok:',m.id)"
